code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个断路器状态图，核心是处理TelemetryStream到ActuatorController的调用链路。初始状态应该是Closed，所有请求正常通过。
明白。那从Closed状态出发，什么情况下会触发状态迁移？是失败次数累积还是响应超时？
当Failure Threshold Exceeded时，由ActuatorController触发，跳转到Open状态。同时Closed内部要有自循环：Successful Request和Failed Request都回到Closed，但后者由TelemetryStream记录。
好的，我画出了Closed到Open的迁移，以及两个自循环。现在处理Open状态——它应该有个超时机制进入HalfOpen对吧？
对，Timeout Elapsed时由ActuatorController触发进入HalfOpen。另外Open状态下如果EdgeNode尝试请求，要保持Open并记录这次尝试。
HalfOpen的逻辑我理一下：测试成功回到Closed，测试失败回到Open，等待测试时保持HalfOpen。这些迁移都是ActuatorController触发吗？
前两个是ActuatorController触发，但Waiting for Test的自循环应该是TelemetryStream触发——它负责持续监控状态。
已修正。现在为三个状态添加右侧注释：Closed说明全量请求通过和错误计数，Open说明阻塞请求和返回缓存，HalfOpen说明限流测试和快速决策。
完美。这样整个断路器模式就覆盖了工业场景下从TelemetryStream经PLC Logic到ActuatorController的完整故障容错链路。
